reviews.comment:
Como siempre, las estaciones de ACA se destacan, la gente, la atención, los espacios, impecables. Mucha demanda, siempre hay fila para cargar combustibles pero hay que ser pacientes. Parada obligada para recorrer esa zona de Catamarca.

(Translated by Google)
As always, ACA stations stand out: the people, the service, the facilities—all impeccable. There's high demand, and there's always a line to fill up, but you just have to be patient. A must-stop when exploring that area of ​​Catamarca.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtcHBqR1RBEAE

reviews.comment:
Difícil el acceso... Y muy lento. Necesitan más personal para la atención en la playa

(Translated by Google)
Access is difficult... and very slow. They need more staff for beach service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlck8tMER3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, en playa y en el Servicompras, la limpieza y el orden excelentes, un detalle, el vaso de agua que vino con el café está casado. Además es la única YPF de la zona. Imposible no parar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, both on the beach and at the convenience store. Cleanliness and organization were superb. One minor issue: the glass of water that came with the coffee was mixed up. It's also the only YPF station in the area. A must-stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtMnFEM2VBEAE
